content_en: The Prophet(~ ) said: «If one of you was in the shade and then the shade receded and exposed a part of his body to the sun, let him move from that place.»44 The most common cause of skin cancer is excessive exposure to the damaging effects of UV radiation from the sun. There are two types of UV radiation: UV A, which has a long wave length, and UVB radiation, which has a shorter, more damaging wavelength and which is mainly responsible for skin lesions. For your safety, you should avoid direct exposure to sunlight during the hours of the day when (in your part of the world) the sun's rays are most harmful. That is why Allah (~) specified shade as one of His great blessings: 44 Abu Dawood and A):imed (sound according to Albani). ~And Allah has made for you that from which He has created shade, and has made for you places of refuge in the mountains, and has made for you garments to protect you from the heat..) (Quran 16: 81)
content_id: Nabi ﷺ bersabda: «Jika salah seorang dari kalian berada di tempat teduh kemudian bayangan teduh itu bergeser sehingga bagian tubuhnya terkena sinar matahari, maka hendaklah ia berpindah dari tempat itu.»44 Penyebab paling umum kanker kulit adalah paparan berlebihan terhadap radiasi UV yang merusak dari matahari. Ada dua jenis radiasi UV: UV A yang memiliki gelombang panjang, dan radiasi UVB yang memiliki gelombang lebih pendek, lebih merusak, dan terutama bertanggung jawab atas lesi kulit. Demi keselamatan Anda, hindari paparan langsung sinar matahari selama jam-jam ketika sinar matahari paling berbahaya di wilayah Anda. Itulah mengapa Allah ﷻ menyebutkan keteduhan sebagai salah satu nikmat-Nya yang agung: 44 Abu Dawood dan Ahmad (sahih menurut Albani). ~Dan Allah menjadikan bagimu tempat bernaung dari apa yang telah Dia ciptakan, dan Dia jadikan bagimu tempat-tempat berlindung di bukit-bukit, dan Dia jadikan bagimu pakaian yang memeliharamu dari panas~ (Al-Quran 16: 81).
